configuration.goals:
You are an agent tracking sales activity for an online retailers and need to monitor Customer Satisfaction and Customer sales agent 
The overall goal is to monitor orders that was paid for and Lost and orders that the customer satisfaction is less than 1
We want to encourage Sales and Merchant Managers to monitor customer satisfaction and reach out to customers with low satisfaction score and lost orders
configuration.instructions:
You need to monitor the data in in the RTIDemoEventHouse and notice when a customersatifaction is less than 1 and the status for orders that are lost 
Use the Order status to identify order that are loss , calculate the amount paid and suggest a offer of refund for that amount

c6091ebb-97bf-4045-ae50-4c5d3d7653bb.description: Identify when an order status is lost and ship new order

placedBy.Name: placedBy
placedBy.Description: The relationship indicating which customer placed a given order.

customerSatisfaction.Name: customerSatisfaction
customerSatisfaction.Description: The satisfaction rating given by the customer for the order.

amountPaid.Name: amountPaid
amountPaid.Description: The amount paid for the order.

Customer.Name: Customer
Customer.Description: An individual or entity who places orders, identified by a customerId and associated with multiple event tables.

Order.Name: Order
Order.Description: A transaction or purchase event placed by a customer, identified by an orderId and associated with customer satisfaction, status, and amount paid.

e7a1c6b2-8c3e-4e8a-9b3d-7f2e2b9e4c1a.Name: Low Customer Satisfaction Order Alert
e7a1c6b2-8c3e-4e8a-9b3d-7f2e2b9e4c1a.Description: Monitor all orders and trigger an alert when the customer satisfaction rating is below 1. When triggered, execute the SalesAnomalities action.

ClassExpression.Expression: ClassExpression: AllOrders ``` Order ``` Annotations: metadata:description "All orders to be monitored for customer satisfaction below threshold"
ClassExpression.Description: All orders to be monitored for customer satisfaction below threshold

b6e3c7e2-8a5e-4e7e-9c2a-2f8e9e2d7a1b.Name: Lost Orders with Payment
b6e3c7e2-8a5e-4e7e-9c2a-2f8e9e2d7a1b.Description: This rule monitors all orders where the status is 'lost' and the amount paid is above 0.0. When such an order is detected, the action 'IdentifyLostOrder' is triggered to identify the lost order and initiate shipping a new one.

ClassExpression.Expression: ClassExpression: LostAndPaidOrders ``` Order that status some (string ['==' "lost"]) and amountPaid some (decimal ['>' 0.0]) ``` Annotations: metadata:description "Orders that are lost and have been paid for"
ClassExpression.Description: Orders that are lost and have been paid for

ActionBinding.Name: IdentifyLostOrder
ActionBinding.Description: Identify when an order status is lost and ship new order
